title: 인제빙어축제 기후·수위 취소 dossier
one_line_verdict: 방문수요가 없어서 실패한 것이 아니라 소양강댐 수위와 결빙조건이 맞지 않아 행사장을 안전하게 만들 수 없어 2024~2026년 3년 연속 무산된 winter-site failure case다.
causal_chain: 인제빙어축제는 1998년 시작된 원조 겨울축제이고, 얼음 위 빙어낚시와 겨울놀이가 핵심이다.
안정적 운영에는 소양강댐 수위가 약 183m 수준이어야 하지만, 2024~2026년에는 높은 수위로 행사장 일부가 수면 아래에 있었다.
가을철 강수와 댐 운영, 겨울철 온화한 기온이 겹치며 행사장 전반 결빙도 형성되지 않았다.
재단은 안전사고 우려 때문에 무리한 강행을 하지 않고 취소를 택했다.
2019년과 2023년에는 각각 방문객/경제효과 lead가 있어 역사적 수요와 지역경제 효과는 확인된다.
따라서 실패 원인은 콘텐츠·홍보·하청보다 물리적 site condition과 기후 적응전략 부재다.

key_numbers.value: 113,011 visitors and KRW 6.186b direct effect lead
key_numbers.meaning: accurate person-counting method was introduced instead of vehicle counting

key_numbers.value: 203,020 visitors and KRW 14.4968b direct regional effect lead
key_numbers.meaning: demand/economic value remained strong before cancellations

key_numbers.value: festival cancelled due high Soyang Dam water level, about EL.190.5 lead
required water level about 183m but actual 185m late range plus insufficient freezing

not_yet_proven: That a contractor, agency or subcontractor caused the cancellation.
That demand disappeared; demand was historically strong but the site could not be formed safely.
That dam water-level control could have been changed without public water-supply, climate-disaster and safety tradeoffs.
That a four-season tourism strategy will economically replace the lost winter-special demand.
next_evidence_needed: Official foundation notices for 2024, 2025 and 2026 cancellations and safety thresholds.
Daily Soyang Dam water level, inflow/outflow and temperature/ice thickness data around planned festival periods.
Local Finance 365 cost/cancellation rows and sunk-cost records.
Resident/merchant impact data for three consecutive non-held years.
Feasibility evidence for alternative venue, artificial ice, summer/four-season festival conversion or program diversification.

evidence_records.claim: 2019 evaluation introduced person-counting and reported 113,011 visitors plus KRW 6.186b direct economic effect.
2023 evaluation reported 203,020 visitors and KRW 14.4968b direct regional effect.
2024 cancellation was linked to high Soyang Dam water level, autumn rain and inability to form the site/ice safely.
2026 cancellation made three consecutive non-held years due water level and insufficient freezing; safe operation would need about 183m water level.
Water-level adjustment is constrained by dam and water-management agencies because future weather, disaster response and water supply matter.
Inje is discussing four-season tourism because repeated winter-site failure undermines the old model.

sources.title: 연합뉴스 - 2019 인제빙어축제 방문객 정확 집계
sources.evidence: 113,011 visitors, KRW 6.186b direct effect, person-counting method

sources.title: G1방송 - 2023 지역경제 효과 144억

sources.title: TheFestival - 기후변화 대응 사계절축제 전환

sources.title: 연합뉴스 - 2026 3년 연속 개최 무산
